reviews.text:
I highly recommend LV Nurse Attorney. I am beyond grateful to have received representation from Craig Perry!
He was exceptionally professional, supportive, and knowledgeable with every aspect of the nursing board review process. He handled all communications with the board and stopped their attempts to wrongfully mishandle my investigation before they received evidence. I am certain that his profound experience made the difference in my case. He and Tyrin always kept me informed about the expected timeline throughout the entire process. His calm, confident, and reassuring demeanor helped alleviate any fears I initially experienced. Thanks to Mr. Perry, my investigation was successfully closed without any detriment to my nursing license.
I've recommended LV Nurse Attorney to many other colleagues and will continue to do so. Thank you Mr. Perry!

I cannot say enough good things about Craig Perry and his assistant Tyrin. If any nurse has a complaint from the BON, they know how stressful it can be. I was so blessed to have found Mr Perry.  He is extremely experienced, knowledgeable, thorough and approachable. He always made time for me and my concerns as he legitimately cares about his clients and their outcome. Craig Perry fought for me, as he was always anticipating the BON’s next step. Ultimately, my case was completely closed with no discipline thanks to Craig and Tyrin. Just hire him! He is absolutely amazing and he’s worth every penny.

I recently had the pleasure of working with Mr. C. Perry and Tyrin on a nursing legal matters, and I cannot emphasize enough how phenomenal his assistance has been. From our first consultation, Mr. Perry demonstrated a deep understanding of the complexities involved in healthcare law, particularly as it pertains to nursing practices.

His meticulous attention to detail and comprehensive knowledge of legal statutes ensured that I felt informed and confident throughout the entire process. Mr. Perry was always available to address my questions, providing clear and concise explanations that helped demystify the legal jargon.

What truly sets Mr. Perry apart is his genuine dedication to his clients. He takes the time to understand individual cases thoroughly, which resulted in tailored advice and strategies that specifically catered to my needs. His professionalism, combined with a personable approach, made a potentially daunting situation much more manageable.

Overall, my experience with Mr. C. Perry and Tyrin was outstanding. I wholeheartedly recommend him to anyone seeking expert assistance in nursing legal matters. His expertise and commitment to his clients are truly commendable.

My free initial consultation with attorney Craig Perry sealed the deal for me. I never felt rushed or timed. He spent an hour talking to me about my case with the BON. He communicated well and answered all my questions. Craig Perry was straightforward and was so easy to talk to. I really felt comfortable for him to represent me. His office manager Tyrin was so kind and respectful. In a very short span of time, my case got dismissed. If you have a complaint with the BON, please do not hesitate to call attorney Craig Perry.

Craig Perry is a lifesaver. He accepted my call while out of the country in the middle of a hurricane. Talk about commitment to his clients! He is dedicated, attentive, compassionate, honest, and straightforward. He is extremely knowledgeable in nursing practice law and knows the ins and outs of the board of nursing. His support staff, especially Tyrin, is amazing. He is worth every penny. Don’t hesitate to hire him. You won’t regret it. He saved my license and my career. Thank you Craig for all you did for me.

I just want to say if you have any doubt in acquiring your license back or you are in jeopardy of losing it, don’t hesitate call Craig Perry. He saved my career! I thought I had no chance of getting my nursing license back after spending 10 years in prison. He first convinced me he could do it then he showed me! It was amazing! I wish everyone who went through something similar in life could watch my journey from start to finish. He will remove all doubt. Him and his staff are top notch! If you don’t believe I’m real, I will tell you in person, just set it up. Thanks Craig for everything.

An outstanding attorney — with an exceptional team behind him. Truly grateful for their support.
I had an exceptional experience with this law firm. They represented my husband in a very complex and stressful case, and the attorney’s professionalism, depth of knowledge, and integrity were evident from the very beginning. He guided us through the entire process with clarity and unwavering commitment, which brought true peace of mind during a time when we felt completely overwhelmed.
Tyrin and the rest of the team were equally remarkable — consistently kind, patient, and attentive. They communicated every step with honesty and respect, and their support made a tremendous difference throughout the entire process.
One thing that truly stood out is how much they genuinely care about their clients. Their dedication, empathy, and careful attention to detail made us feel protected and understood. It’s clear that strong, ethical representation can truly shape the outcome of a case, and we are deeply grateful for everything they accomplished for my husband.
I wholeheartedly recommend this attorney and his team to anyone who needs a legal professional who is not only highly skilled, but also compassionate, honest, and sincerely invested in achieving the best possible result.

An outstanding attorney — with an exceptional team behind him. Truly grateful for their support.
I had an exceptional experience with this law firm. They represented my husband in a very complex and stressful case, and the attorney’s professionalism, depth of knowledge, and integrity were evident from the very beginning. He guided us through the entire process with clarity and unwavering commitment, which brought true peace of mind during a time when we felt completely overwhelmed.
Tyrin and the rest of the team were equally remarkable — consistently kind, patient, and attentive. They communicated every step with honesty and respect, and their support made a tremendous difference throughout the entire process.
One thing that truly stood out is how much they genuinely care about their clients. Their dedication, empathy, and careful attention to detail made us feel protected and understood. It’s clear that strong, ethical representation can truly shape the outcome of a case, and we are deeply grateful for everything they accomplished for my husband.
I wholeheartedly recommend this attorney and his team to anyone who needs a legal professional who is not only highly skilled, but also compassionate, honest, and sincerely invested in achieving the best possible result.
I am thankful for the expertise and guidance of Craig Perry and Assoc.  I would defined recommend his services to anyone.

Mr. Perry and Tyrin were truly a blessing to me in such a dark time. I had to defend my nursing license before the Board of Nursing and the Board of Pharmacy, and these two truly advocated for me and showcased their true expertise in handling these types of cases. Tyrin and Mr. Perry are exceptionally kind, knowledgable, and supportive, and I felt so supported throughout handling my case which took over 7 months to come to a close. Mr. Perry ensured that I received the fair outcome, and my case was closed. I cannot thank these two enough for their grace, advocacy, honesty, and kindness. Your representation DOES effect your outcome! I would recommend Mr. Perry and Tyrin to anyone needing an honest attorney who truly cares about their clients.
An excellent job done! I have recommended him to multiple professionals due to his efficiency and professionalism. He does not disappoint.

Where do I begin...I have so much gratitude and appreciation for attorney Perry and his paralegal, Tyrin, that words cannot express.

I never thought, in my 38 years in the nursing profession, that I would ever need legal representation.  However, everything changed 2 years ago when I became associated with some extremely unscrupulous people whose sole purpose was to ruin my career. I truly believe that they would have accomplished that if I hadn't found Mr. Perry and Tyrin.  They explained everything to me, answered my questions in a very reasonable amount of time ,sometimes within the same hour I asked, or I could call Tyrin during business hours, and she would get answers from attorney Perry within an hour or so after I called.

I LOVE the fact that they support the nursing profession, whether bedside nurses or an advanced practice nurse like myself. I would HIGHLY recommend them to anyone in the healthcare profession, especially advanced practice nurses, as I have already done.  Although I hope that I will never have to hire them again, I am so grateful that they were here when I needed someone on my side.
Craig and his team did a great job assisting me on my issues. I highly recommend them.

Attorney Perry is so helpful and knowledgeable! He's very compassionate, and his team is very experienced and easy to work with as well. I would recommend this firm to anyone who needs legal assistance!
Thank you for ruining my life and my license. Wasted my time and money , and I can no longer practice. Beware, this attorney !!!

Thank you so much Mr craig for your assistance. You God send from above you help me thru this hard times with the state board of nursing. I can't do it without you thank you tyrin also for everything. Best lawyer in town

Craig was a great attorney! Excellent staff who always listen to your concerns and needs. He was always honest and upfront about everything, which is rare when dealing with most attorneys. Also, Tyrin is one of the best paralegals in town, and I truly mean that. Craig is super lucky to have her, which is why they both make such a great team! Highly recommend them to anyone!
